metadata.prompt:
Create a HTML Beatmaking game for all music lover by infinitely able to read any .json that contain music note instruction only within 4/8/16/32 beat
 
layout will be
[play] [pause] [stop] [SAVE to webM/wav]

BPM [set]
[4/8/16/32] beat loop]
low mid high [pinned slider]
track 1 ".JSONREADER"
track 2 
track 3
track 4

"this 4 track above could be anything" 

KICK
bass
Hihat
Snare

use your AI to fill the track!

a hint promt for your AI will be:
a
b
c
d

where all AI and Human can make music together

generatedFiles.content:
Game 1 - Counter Click

Click the button to increase the counter.

Count: 0

Game 2 - Simple Dodge

Use the "Move" button and avoid the red square.
